actions: Run URL Inspection API on all 7 target URLs
Check coverageState for each
LIKELY_REQUESTED pages: confirm request status appeared
Check whether any unknown-to-Google pages moved to Discovered
Check whether any Discovered pages moved to indexing
Record all coverageState changes
day_3.success_gate: At least 1/4 previously unknown pages now discovered. At least 1/3 LIKELY_REQUESTED pages confirmed requested.
day_3.failure_response: Wait 4 more days. Do not retry requests.

actions: Run URL Inspection API on all 7 target URLs
Check index status for all 7
Pull fresh GSC Search Analytics for impressions on target URLs
Check GSC Pages UI for category movement
Document any pages that achieved Submitted and indexed
Flag pages still stuck in Discovered/Unknown
day_7.success_gate: At least 3/7 pages indexed (Submitted and indexed) OR discovered (for previously unknown)
day_7.failure_response: Consider internal link additions from higher-authority pages. Do not retry indexing requests.

actions: Run URL Inspection API on all 7 target URLs
Pull fresh GSC Search Analytics with page dimension for targets
Classify each URL: SUCCESS / PROGRESS / STUCK
For SUCCESS pages: check impressions trend
For STUCK pages: identify root cause (content quality, authority, crawl)
day_14.success_gate: At least 5/7 pages indexed. At least 2/7 pages showing impressions.
day_14.failure_response: Escalate to content quality investigation. Pages may need deeper improvements.

actions: Final classification for all 7 targets
Mark each as: SUCCESSFUL / NEEDS_MORE_INTERNAL_LINKS / NEEDS_CONTENT_UPGRADE / NEEDS_PARENT_AUTHORITY / STILL_BLOCKED
Document lessons learned for Phase 22 indexing strategy
If 0/7 indexed: investigate systemic blocking (sandbox, quality, penalty)
day_21.success_gate: At least 5/7 pages indexed. At least 3/7 pages showing impressions.
day_21.failure_response: Phase 22 indexing strategy revision required. May need backlinks or content overhaul.
